scope: factual proof of observable OpenAI API connectivity for AiGOL

OPENAI_API_KEY_PRESENT.evidence: Environment probe returned OPENAI_API_KEY_PRESENT=TRUE and OPENAI_API_KEY_LENGTH=164.

OPENAI_PROVIDER_INITIALIZED.evidence: Live run constructed OpenAIProviderAdapter(timeout_seconds=20), registered openai_provider_metadata(), and recorded provider_status AVAILABLE.

REAL_REQUEST_SENT.evidence: Replay recorded endpoint https://api.openai.com/v1/responses, model gpt-5.1, stream false, and proof prompt payload.

REAL_RESPONSE_RECEIVED.evidence: Replay recorded raw OpenAI response id resp_02aefc54f17190e6006a1d499ad4dc819cbfde31d6905b008f, object response, status completed, model gpt-5.1-2025-11-13, and usage total_tokens 61.

REPLAY_RECORDED.evidence: Replay files 000_provider_proposal_created.json and 001_provider_proposal_returned.json were written with replay hashes.

REPLAY_RECONSTRUCTABLE.evidence: reconstruct_provider_attachment_replay returned provider_invoked true and replay_artifact_count 2.

evidence: No client argument was injected into OpenAIProviderAdapter during the proof run.
Replay contains live OpenAI response metadata including response id, object=response, status=completed, resolved dated model, billing metadata, and token usage.
